sources.why_used: Official FDA-approved drug labeling (package inserts / SmPC). Used for side effects, contraindications, interactions, pregnancy categories.
Drug adverse events, drug labeling, drug recall data. Used for interaction confirmation, contraindication confirmation.

sources.source_name: PMBJP — Pradhan Mantri Bhartiya Janaushadhi Pariyojana
sources.source_type: Indian Government generic medicine scheme catalog
sources.operator: Department of Pharmaceuticals, Government of India
sources.why_used: Official list of Jan Aushadhi generics with approved prices. Used for salt_mapping, alternatives, and Jan Aushadhi pricing.
sources.access_method: PDF download from website. No public API documented.

sources.source_name: CDSCO — Central Drugs Standard Control Organisation
sources.operator: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare, Government of India
sources.why_used: Indian-specific drug approvals, banned drugs list, Schedule H/H1/X classifications. Used for prescription_required field verification.
sources.access_method: Web search. Partial data available at https://cdsco.gov.in/opencms/opencms/en/Drugs/Approved-drugs/

sources.why_used: Global standard for essential medicines classification. Used to validate medicine importance and cross-check safety data.

sources.operator: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare, Government of India
sources.why_used: Disease definitions and India-specific health condition data. Used for diseases.json.
Brand name mapping, salt mapping verification, indicative pricing. Treated as secondary source only — must be cross-verified with official sources.
Secondary brand mapping and pricing verification.
Tertiary brand name and pricing cross-check.
High-priority drug safety warnings (QT prolongation, metformin/contrast, statin interactions). Used in interactions.json.
